We are pleased to announce that Gatwick Car & Van Rental is now part of UK Car and Van Rental. In the coming months, we will be updating our branding and website, allowing customers to book vehicles from all major London airports and across the South East of England. Please get in [touch](https://www.gatwickcarandvanrental.com/contact/) if you have any questions.

Cars from £16. Vans from £18.

- Free Pick Up & Drop Off Service

- Fleet of over 300 vehicles

- No vehicle over 12 months old

- Free breakdown Cover


Book now

# Car & Van Hire in Gatwick & Crawley

**Gatwick Car and Van Rental is an award-winning vehicle hire company, located just minutes away from Gatwick airport.**

We provide a wide selection of low-cost, high-quality vehicles to customers in Gatwick, Crawley and the surrounding areas of London.

With a fleet of over 300 vehicles, we can cater to all customer requirements. Whether you’re looking for short term car hire, long term car hire, corporate or commercial rentals, we can accommodate. We offer competitive prices for all our vehicle rental services, including:

- [Car Hire](https://www.gatwickcarandvanrental.com/car-hire/)
- [Van Hire](https://www.gatwickcarandvanrental.com/van-hire/)
- [Minibus Hire](https://www.gatwickcarandvanrental.com/mini-bus-hire/)
- [MPV Hire](https://www.gatwickcarandvanrental.com/mpv-hire/)
- [Tipper Truck Hire](https://www.gatwickcarandvanrental.com/van-hire/)
- [Luton Van Hire](https://www.gatwickcarandvanrental.com/van-hire/)
- [Electric Car Hire](https://www.gatwickcarandvanrental.com/electric-cars/)
- [Electric Van Hire](https://www.gatwickcarandvanrental.com/electric-vans/)

We offer a free pickup and drop-off service, along with free breakdown cover, to ensure you get to your destination safely. Take a look around our website to discover [**our fantastic deals**](https://www.gatwickcarandvanrental.com/hire-deals/) on short term **[van hire](https://www.gatwickcarandvanrental.com/van-hire/)**, **[long term van hire](https://www.gatwickcarandvanrental.com/long-term-hire/)**, and many of our other vehicle hire services. To enquire about booking a hire vehicle, **[get in contact](https://www.gatwickcarandvanrental.com/contact/)** with our friendly team over the phone or online.
